title: HOZELOCK - Starter Nozzle Kit 3-in-1 : Ergonomic Soft Grip Lance, Non-Slip, 3 Jets, 2 Connections Ø 12.5mm - Ø 15mm (1/2" - 5/8"), 1 Tap Connection [‎100-100-228]
description: From the manufacturer 3 IN 1 WATERING 12.5MM S/SET Compact and adjustable hose nozzle with 3 spray patterns. 3 IN 1 WATERING 12.5MM S/SET 3 in 1 Nozzle – Offers versatility and allows users to adapt their watering style to suit the task at hand. 3 Spray Patterns – Perfect for Rinsing, Cleaning and Fine Watering; the 3-in-1 nozzle has soft-touch grips making it more comfortable to use. This set includes an outdoor tap connector and hose end connector for connecting a hose to the tap. It also includes an Aqua Stop Connector for quick attachment and removal of the spray gun, giving a leak free connection every time. Key benefits include: 3 adjustable spray patterns to suit the task at hand. Wide Cone spray, Powerful Jet spray, and a NEW Fine Rose spray for delicate watering. Ergonomic design with soft-touch grips. Twist to Use Twist to choose your preferred spray pattern. The nozzle includes instruction arrows offering clear guidance for use. Quick-Connect The Hozelock 3-in-1 Nozzle comes with a quick-connect male connector for fast changing between devices, a secure drip-free attachment. Instructions PRODUCT FEATURES Wide Cone Spray – For Rinsing Powerful Jet Spray – For Cleaning Fine Rose Spray – For Delicate Watering 3 IN 1 NOZZLE PLUS STD 3 IN 1 WATERING 12.5MM S/SET Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.6 out of 5 stars 215 4.7 out of 5 stars 189 Price £7.59 £ 7 . 59 £12.50 £ 12 . 50 Gun Type Nozzle Nozzle Starter Set Spray Gun Usage Delicate Watering, Rinsing, Cleaning Delicate Watering, Rinsing, Cleaning Spray Patterns Cone, Jet, Fine Rose Cone, Jet, Fine Rose Control Adjustable Nozzle Adjustable Nozzle Material TPE, Plastic TPE, Plastic Included Nozzle gun 1/2″ & 3/4″ Outdoor Tap Connector, Aquastop Connector, Hose End Connector, Nozzle gun
